summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The shard has no shared canonical and no close/merge/fix recommendation. Nine open PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review or author follow-up, and #89635 is routed to central security handling because the validator identified it as security-sensitive.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with unique plugin runtime scope; no duplicate, superseding canonical, or low-signal close evidence.
Independent broad feature/reliability PR; not suitable for closure or merge planning in this shard.
Independent UI/gateway feature PR with unique scope; keep open for maintainer review or author follow-up.
Independent draft provider metadata PR; keep open rather than close or merge.
Independent narrow bugfix PR with unresolved proof signal; keep open for proof/review.
Independent Discord feature PR; keep open for normal review rather than closure.
Security-sensitive PR identified by deterministic validation; quarantine this item with route_security and continue classifying unrelated non-security PRs.
Independent Codex extension bugfix PR with failed proof signal; keep open for author/maintainer review.
Independent command parsing bugfix PR; keep open because no hydrated issue closeout or merge path is available.
Independent agent handoff bugfix PR with unresolved real-behavior proof; keep open for proof/review.
